case_title: LIPSCOMB, LAWRENCE et al VS PATEL, NICK DBA HENRY HOTEL et al

docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF HAVE THEIR COPIES STAMPED WITH A NEW DATE TO SERVE DEFENDANTS.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY LIPSCOMB, LAWRENCE LIPSCOMB, JESSICA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, NICK DBA HENRY HOTEL PATEL, MARY DBA HENRY HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, MARY DBA HENRY HOTEL
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO JESSICA LIPSCOMB RETURNED UNDELIVERED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIPSCOMB, LAWRENCE LIPSCOMB, JESSICA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATEL, NICK DBA HENRY HOTEL PATEL, MARY DBA HENRY HOTEL CLAIM AGAINST NICK PATEL DBA HENRY HOTEL DISMISSED FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE PROOF OF LAWFUL SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-27-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-08-2006 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 5/8/06 AT 6:30 P.M. FOR PLAINTIFF TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE OF BOTH DEFENDANTS NAMED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT SENT TO LIPSCOMB, LAWRENCE RETURNED UNDELIVERED. NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-08-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-19-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR TRIAL TO CURE PROOF OF SERVICE.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO LAWRENCE LIPSCOMB RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
